title: PhasePad
description: A special block with a panel where you enter coordinates. When you press Enter on that panel, the block directly above it is instantly teleported to the configured coordinates.
body: The PhasePad is a device that instantly transports the block placed directly above it to coordinates set through its built-in panel. Just enter the destination and confirm, and the spatial jump happens right away. It can also be powered with redstone repeaters, making it easy to integrate into circuits, traps, or automated systems. With an optional upgrade, the PhasePad can teleport entities as well, including players, turning it into a versatile tool for movement, building, and advanced map mechanics.
